sections.location: Hallway outside each bedroom (2nd floor), kitchen ceiling near the stove, and basement near the utility room.
Located in the utility closet on the main floor, behind the door to the left of the garage entrance.
In the garage on the far wall (right side), mounted at eye level in a gray metal panel box. Each breaker is labeled.
Main water shut off is in the basement, on the front wall near the water meter. Turn the handle clockwise (right) to shut off water.
Return air vent in the hallway ceiling of the 1st floor. Filter size: 16x25x1.
Exterior of the house on the right side, mounted to the brick wall near the back corner.
Front door (doorbell cam), rear patio (soffit-mounted), and driveway (left eave). All cameras are exterior only.

tips.text: Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
